# Multi-Stakeholder Recommendation Systems

The PUDAL controller operates an MSRS that generates a recommendation vector for all stakeholders.

![Figure 7. Recommendation vectors produced by the PUDAL-controlled MSRS.](/figures/generated/f_07.png){#fig-msrs}

{{< include /tables/table10_recommendation_vector.qmd >}}

{{< include /tables/table13_msrs_policies.qmd >}}

{{< include /tables/table14_utilities.qmd >}}
